blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain Michigan is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
